subcodes.title: Words spoken at Hotel Marquardt in Stuttgart, 1913-04-04
subcodes.first_line: I hope that each one of you may become a divine farmer and each one may cultivate a large blessed farm. The real Bahá'í farming is through deeds.
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @goodly deeds; actions, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @bringing forth results; fruit, @being a source of light; guidance, @spiritual transformation
